hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts) cd /Users/bernardocjs/Documents/Pessoal/Exams/shipping && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files â€” they may contain secrets. Edit .env.example instead.' && exit 2;; */node_modules/*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit node_modules' && exit 2;; *package-lock.json) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit package-lock.json directly â€” use npm install' && exit 2;; esac

cd /Users/bernardocjs/Documents/Pessoal/Exams/shipping && echo '[pre-commit gate] running lint + tests...' && npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -5 && npm test 2>&1 | tail -20 || (echo 'BLOCKED: lint or tests failed â€” fix before committing' && exit 2)

branch=$(git -C /Users/bernardocjs/Documents/Pessoal/Exams/shipping branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); changed=$(git -C /Users/bernardocjs/Documents/Pessoal/Exams/shipping diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -10); echo "SHIPPING API â€” branch: $branch | changed: ${changed:-none}
Stack: Express 5 + TypeScript strict + Prisma (PostgreSQL) + Pino + Zod
Arch: Routesâ†’Controllersâ†’UseCasesâ†’Providers (clean arch, constructor DI)
Errors: AppErrorâ†’NotFoundError(404)/BadRequestError(400)/ExternalServiceError(503)
Tests: Vitest + vitest-mock-extended, mockDeep<T>(). Run: npm test
Domain: Shipment{PENDINGâ†’IN_TRANSITâ†’DELIVERED/CANCELLED}, OSRM for distance
Rules: .claude/rules/ | Agents: backend/sre/devops | Skills: /feature /add-endpoint /review /prod-check"

branch=$(git -C /Users/bernardocjs/Documents/Pessoal/Exams/shipping branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); changed=$(git -C /Users/bernardocjs/Documents/Pessoal/Exams/shipping diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); staged=$(git -C /Users/bernardocjs/Documents/Pessoal/Exams/shipping diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "[git] branch: $branch | $changed unstaged, $staged staged"
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true

changed=$(git -C /Users/bernardocjs/Documents/Pessoal/Exams/shipping diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$changed" | grep -qE '^src/'; then echo "[VERIFY] src/ files changed â€” recommended: npm run lint && npm test"; fi; if echo "$changed" | grep -qE '^prisma/'; then echo "[VERIFY] prisma/ changed â€” check migration status: npx prisma migrate status"; fi
